hero.headline: We design systems that give time back.
hero.subheadline: NodeMatics helps small teams eliminate repetitive work by installing simple, reliable systems inside Google Workspace.
hero.trustLine: No SaaS. No lock-in. You own the system in your Drive.

problem.title: Most teams don't lose time all at once. They lose it quietly.

body.p6: Together, they consume hours — every week.
body.p7: NodeMatics exists to remove that friction.

position.title: What NodeMatics Does
position.body: NodeMatics is a systems engineering studio. We don't sell software licenses. We don't replace tools you already use. We don't add dashboards for the sake of dashboards. We design and install internal systems that:

focus.title: Our Current Focus
focus.body: Right now, NodeMatics focuses on high-impact, small-scope systems built on Google Workspace:
focus.closing: This focus is intentional. Simple systems, done well, outperform complex platforms.

closing.title: Start Small. Save Time. Build from There.
closing.body: Most clients start with one workflow. One report that no longer needs rebuilding. One follow-up that no longer gets forgotten. One system that just works. From there, we build only what's needed.

opening.title: What We Believe
opening.subtitle: The principles behind how NodeMatics designs systems.

manifesto.p1: Time is the most valuable asset. Not data. Not tools. Not technology. Small teams lose it quietly — one repeated task at a time.
manifesto.p2: Repetition quietly destroys focus. Emails copied into spreadsheets. Reports rebuilt every week. Tasks remembered instead of tracked. None of it is hard. It is unnecessary.
manifesto.p3: Systems beat effort. Working harder does not scale. Adding tools does not fix broken workflows. Clear systems do.
manifesto.p4: Use what already exists. Most businesses already pay for the tools they need. They do not use them as systems. We design inside — not on top.
manifesto.p5: Ownership matters. If a system runs your business, you own it. Your data. Your logic. No lock-in.
manifesto.p6: Automation should be quiet. The best system is the one you forget about. It does not announce itself. It works.
manifesto.p7: AI is a tool, not the point. It can draft, summarize, enrich. Logic comes first. Reliability always wins.
manifesto.p8: Focus creates authority. We do not chase every problem. We solve one class of problem well: wasted time caused by broken internal workflows.

whatWeDo.title: What We Do
whatWeDo.body: NodeMatics designs and installs small, reliable internal systems that remove friction, create clarity, and give time back.

notDo.item3: Does not build complexity for its own sake

products.title: When Systems Repeat
products.body: When a system failure repeats at scale, NodeMatics sometimes turns the solution into a product. EngagePerfect and Veil are examples — outcomes of systems thinking, not the business focus.

closing.line2: We believe less work, done better, changes everything.

install.title: Install

prove.title: Prove

software.question: Do we need new software?
software.answer: No. Everything runs inside your existing Google Workspace — Sheets, Drive, Gmail. No new logins, no new subscriptions.

data.question: Do you store our data?
data.answer: No. All data lives in your Google account. We build inside your Workspace; we don't host or store your data.

ai.question: Is AI required?
ai.answer: No. Our systems are logic-first. AI is optional where it adds value (e.g. drafting or summarising); nothing depends on it.

hero.title: Example Systems We've Installed
hero.subtitle: Real workflows we've automated for clients. Each installation is adapted to the specific business.

taskAssignment.title: Role-Based Task Assignment System
taskAssignment.problem: Tasks were tracked informally, ownership was unclear, and follow-ups were missed.
taskAssignment.system: A role-based task assignment system built in Google Sheets with automated reminders, status tracking, and weekly reporting.
taskAssignment.outcome: The team gained clarity without introducing Jira or Asana. Everything runs inside their existing Google Workspace.

configurator.title: Modular Stack Configurator
configurator.problem: Manual configuration led to pricing errors and repeated document creation.
configurator.system: A Google Sheets-based configurator that validates inputs, applies business constraints, and generates branded PDFs automatically.
configurator.outcome: Sales cycles shortened, errors dropped, and outputs became consistent. The system is re-runnable and fully owned by the client.

emailLogger.title: Email → Sheet Auto-Logger + Follow-Up System
emailLogger.problem: Support emails were manually logged into spreadsheets, and follow-ups were often forgotten.
emailLogger.system: Incoming emails are automatically parsed, key fields extracted, and appended to a Google Sheet. Follow-up reminders are sent at +3, +7, and +14 days if no reply is received.
emailLogger.outcome: The team eliminated copy-paste work and never missed a follow-up again.

note.line1: Each installation is adapted to the client's workflow.
note.line2: Logic and structure vary by business.
note.line3: These are examples of patterns we implement — not ready-made products.
